sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n15004" key="a)rqrembo/lhsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀρθρεμ-βόλησις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n15004.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">setting of a limb,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0660.tlg001:1:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Apollon.Cit.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.1</biblScope> </bibl>:—also <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀρθρεμ-βολία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:49:9:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">49.9.5</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
